metadata.title: Dreams (2001 Remaster)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:10.63] Now here you go again, you say you want your freedom
[00:24.93] Well, who am I to keep you down?
[00:32.58] It's only right that you should play the way you feel it
[00:40.06] But listen carefully to the sound of your loneliness
[00:48.35] Like a heartbeat drives you mad
[00:51.67] In the stillness of remembering what you had
[00:58.82] And what you lost
[01:02.81] And what you had
[01:06.82] And what you lost
[01:11.74] Oh, thunder only happens when it's raining
[01:19.66] Players only love you when they're playing
[01:27.12] Say, women, they will come and they will go
[01:35.52] When the rain washes you clean, you'll know
[01:42.93] You'll know
[01:46.69] 
[02:00.61] Now here I go again, I see the crystal visions
[02:08.47] I keep my visions to myself
[02:16.22] It's only me who wants to wrap around your dreams
[02:23.53] And have you any dreams you'd like to sell?
[02:29.53] Dreams of loneliness
[02:31.88] Like a heartbeat drives you mad
[02:35.16] In the stillness of remembering what you had
[02:42.79] And what you lost
[02:46.64] And what you had
[02:50.79] Oh, what you lost
[02:55.67] Thunder only happens when it's raining
[03:03.78] Players only love you when they're playing
[03:11.48] Women, they will come and they will go
[03:19.50] When the rain washes you clean, you'll know
[03:27.43] Oh, thunder only happens when it's raining
[03:35.47] Players only love you when they're playing
[03:42.86] Say, women, they will come and they will go
[03:51.46] When the rain washes you clean, you'll know
[03:58.51] You'll know
[04:02.64] You will know
[04:06.32] Oh, you'll know
[04:09.06]
